titleStmt.title: SII 24.153: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 153. (A.R. No. 72 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records an endowment of 100,000 kāśu to the temple by Dēviyār Sōmaladēviyār for a lamp and a flower-garden. 50,000 kāśu out of the endowment is said to have been contributed from the treasury (bhaṇḍāram) of the queen Sōmaladēviyār and the balance by Padineṇvishaya-Brahmachakravarttigaḷ of Vaṅgippuṟam and Taṇṇantuḻāydāsar, a dāsa-nambi, in equal shares of 25,000 kāśu. The former amount was set apart for the supply of ghee for the lamps (kaṟpūra-maṇiviḷakku) and out of the latter, two plots of land 8 mā in extent for a flower garden for 20,000 kāśu and 3 vēli for 30,000 kāśu for maintaining four gardeners for the upkeep of the garden were purchased. Dated in the 21st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 21 vatu Āṭi māsattu patiṉoṉṟāntiyati nāḷ deviyār somaladeviyār Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukku tiruppaḷḷittāmañ cāttit tirunantavaṉaṅ koḷḷavum tirunanta vaṉañ ceyyuñ śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukku jivaṉattukku nilaṅ koḷḷavum
tirinuntāviḷakkerikkavum veṇṭuvatukku Iṟṟaināḷāl deviyār paṇṭārattil niṉṟum puṟappaṭṭa kācu nūṟāyira mitil tiruviḷakkukku Ubhayamāka śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu Aimpatiṉāyirattukkup policaiyāṟ kāciṭṭu nāḷoṉṟukkut tiruva raṅkatevanāḻiyāle nāḻiney tirinuntā viḷakkāka
kaṟpūramaṇiviḷakkile Erikkak kaṭavatākavum tirunantavaṉaṅkaḷ koḷḷavun tirunanta vaṉañ ceyyum śrī vayiṣṇavarkaḷukku jivaṉattukku nilaṅkoḷḷavum puṟappaṭṭa kācu Aimpatiṉāyiramum Iraṇṭu perāy tirunantavaṉañ ceyya veṇṭukaiyil tiruppati śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷil vaṅkippuṟattup patiṉeṇviṣaiya
brahmaccakkaravattikaḷ vacam puṟappaṭṭa kācu Irupattaiyyāyiramum dāsanampimāril taṇṇantuḻāy dāsar vacam puṟappaṭṭa kācu Irupattaiyyāyiramum Ākak kācu Aimpatiṉāyirattukkut tirukkuṟaippaṟṟut teṉṉoḻukil meṟkaṭaiya vaṅkippuṟattup patiṉeṇviṣaiya brahmaccakkaravattikaḷ
tirunantavaṉattukku vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi nānūṟṟiṉāl nilam nālumāvum Ivvoḻukil kiḻakkaṭaiyat taṇṇantuḻāy dāsar tirunantavaṉattil vilaikoṇṭa kuḻi nānūṟṟiṉāl nilam nālumāvum Ākat tirunantavaṉam Iraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟināl nilam Eṭṭu māvukku vilai
ppaṭi kācu Irupatināyiramum Ittirunantavaṉaṅkaḷ ceyyuñ śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ per nālvaṟkup peroṉṟukku nāḷoṉṟukkuc cāṉṟāpaṭi marakkālāle mukkuṟuṇi Āka nāḷoṉṟukku nellukkalattukku vilaikoṇṭa nilam muṉṟu velikku vilaiyppaṭi
kācu muppatināyiramum kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi jivaṉampeṟṟu Ittirunantavaṉaṅkaḷil tiruttuḻāy mallikai yiruvācci karumukai ceṇpakam tamanakam kūvaḷai nantiyā vatta muḷḷiṭṭa tiruppaḷḷittāmaṅkaḷun teṅku māvum pilāvum vāḻaiyu muḷḷiṭṭa maraṅka(ḷ)ḷum vai
ttākki nittappaṭiyilum Eḻuntaruḷun tirunāḷkaḷilum nāḷoṉṟukku nālu tiruttoḷmālaiyum Ivvaṟkaṅkaḷil tiruppaḷḷittāmamum Eṭuttuc cāttiyaruḷap paṇṇavum Ippaṭi Idhanmam(ṅ) cantirātittaval cellakkaṭavatākavum ni(c)cayittuk kalveṭṭiṉamaikku Ip
paṭi śrīvayiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 24.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
